label: Introduction to Dangers
description: Characters learn about the dangers facing Stormwreak Isle

label: Pursuit
description: Two residents flee while being chased by three sailor-zombie attackers

label: Crash Investigation
description: Characters learn about mysterious shipwrecks and are encouraged to investigate causes

label: Compass Rose Revelation
description: Runara directs attention to the ancient wreck of Compass Rose as potential answers

label: Rescue Scenario
description: Characters awaken in the temple after being rescued by Runara

label: Tide Shift Mechanics
description: Description of tidal patterns affecting access to submerged sections of the caves

label: Stirge Join Battle
description: Two stirge cling to the tunnel ceiling and join combat if fighting erupts in this area

label: Mushroom Stirs
description: A sickly-looking mushroom stirs to life and extends tendrils toward the party.

label: Discovery of Heart Cap Mushrooms
description: Characters discover heart cap mushrooms requiring a skill check to harvest.

label: Vigilant Defense
description: Conscious myconids aggressively defend against unescorted intruders

label: Meld State
description: Four myconids enter a shared transcendental trance state

label: Defense of Sinensa
description: Myconid Adults attack intruders lacking fellow myconids while protecting their unconscious leader

label: Fume_Drake_Encounter
description: Two Fume Drake attack intruders in the cave

label: Blight_Source_Discovered
description: Characters identify the tomb of Sharruth as the source of the blight

label: Fissure_Blocked_By_Crystal
description: The fissure is blocked by an orange crystal emitting light

label: Breaking_Fire_Crystal
description: Destroying the orange crystal stops the blight and releases a fire snake.

label: Fire_Snake_Encounter
description: A fire snake emerges from the shattered crystal and attacks the characters.

label: Sunlight_Refractive_Effect
description: Crystals refract sunlight, flooding the cave with brilliant illumination.

label: Third Fume Drake Appearance
description: A third fume drake emerges in the room when the characters first arrive.

label: Fire Snake Hatch and Additional Fume Drakes
description: As the fire snake hatches from its egg, two more fume drakes emerge from the purple crystals.
